name: Document deadlines
description: Reads each newly readable document for dated obligations (expiries, renewals, due dates) and stages tentative calendar events for your review — dateless guesses are dropped, never invented.
prompt: When documents become readable, find dated obligations: expiry dates, renewal deadlines, payment due dates. Stage each as a tentative calendar event named for what it is, so renewal reminders can watch them. Only extract dates that are actually visible in the document.

vault.why: Reads newly readable documents' text, extracts dated obligations, and stages tentative core.event rows for review (issue #299 phase 4 — 'your documents watch your deadlines').
